arts.ttl: Arne Slot channels Michael Jordan with defence of 'lucky' Liverpool win over PSG
arts.sum: Arne Slot quotes Michael Jordan to defend Liverpool's 1-0 win over PSG.

arts.ttl: Liverpool striker was signed as 'experiment' before Everton rejected shock transfer approach
arts.sum: Dr. Ian Graham, Liverpool’s former director of research, has lifted the lid on the story

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s new £25million man faces up to reality after being proven right about one thing
arts.sum: Georgi Mamardashvili joined Liverpool in the summer transfer window but was immediately loaned out to Valencia - and claimed Alisson's red-hot run of form was the reason he did not join the club this year

arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs Southampton - Premier League
arts.sum: How Liverpool could line up for their Premier League clash with Southampton on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans to have 2022 Champions League final injury claims heard in UK
arts.athr: Robyn Vinter, North of England correspondent
arts.sum: Judge rules in favour of football supporters after Uefa’s attempt to block court claims being held in Liverpool Liverpool fans affected by the chaos surrounding the 2022 Champions League final in Paris have the right to have their personal injury claims heard in the UK, a judge has ruled, after an attempt by European football’s governing body to block it. A number of supporters were hurt at the Stade de France in Paris during overcrowding when their club played against Real Madrid in the men’s final of the European competition on 28 May 2022. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Liverpool's new £25million signing proven right as tough reality becomes crystal clear
arts.sum: Giorgi Mamardashvili didn't want to join Liverpool immediately due to the presence of Alisson - and the Brazilian has shown why the young shot-stopper was right to be wary

arts.ttl: Arsenal DISASTER as Liverpool barge into Sesko transfer race
arts.sum: Liverpool have entered the race for top Arsenal target Benjamin Sesko and they certainly pose the most credible threat to the Gunners. Arsenal were the favourites to sign him last year as Sesko was sold on their project before opting to continue his development in Germany.

arts.ttl: Team News: Liverpool vs. Southampton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Liverpool and Southampton.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk points finger at four Liverpool players for their performances at PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool rode their luck and had goalkeeper Alisson Becker to thank as they kept out Paris Saint-Germain in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Manchester United scouted €100m star in PSG vs Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly scouted Paris Saint-Germain winger Desire Doue in the Champions League game against Liverpool in midweek. According to Stretty News, Man Utd also recently had scouts monitoring Doue in a game against Lille, so it seems clear he’s a player they’re keen to keep an eye on.
